allow: Bash(grep -n -E 'proxy|PROXY|npm_mirror|registry|npm config' ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || echo "No proxy-related lines in .zshrc")

Bash(unset http_proxy https_proxy HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY all_proxy no_proxy)
Bash(rm -rf /Users/lsj/vscodeproj/test-tool/.venv /Users/lsj/vscodeproj/test-tool/venv && echo "✅ 旧 venv 和 Windows .venv 已删除")
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove invalid proxy config, update lock file *)
